\cvsection{Projects}

\cvevent{Hexapod}{TUBOT}{Sep 2020 -- Present}{Berlin, Germany}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Developing a simulation environment for the hexapod robot that maps the sensors and actuators of the robot to a simulated map that can be used to work on reinforcement learning algorithms for the robot.
\end{itemize}

\divider

\cvevent{ChessBot}{Learning and Intelligent Systems Lab}{Apr 2020 -- Jul 2020}{Berlin, Germany}
\begin{itemize}
    \item As part of the AI and Robotics Practical course, developed a scenario where two robotic Panda hands play chess against each other, implemented using a closed loop vision and control system, using the RAI-Python for kinematics, Nvidia PhysX for simulation, and Stockfish for generating chess moves.  
\end{itemize}

\divider

\cvevent{AUTOBOT}{DAI-Labor}{Apr 2020 -- Aug 2020}{Berlin, Germany}
\begin{itemize}
    \item As part of the Advanced AI project course,worked on behavioral modelling using finite automata implemented on ROS for an autonomous vehicle to navigate in uncertain environments in a simulation implemented in MORSE. 
\end{itemize}

\divider

\cvevent{Astro AI}{Personal}{Jun 2020 -- Sep 2020}{Berlin, Germany}
\begin{itemize}
    \item An RNN built using Keras on a tensorflow backend to create astrological prediction text similar to the ones available on astrological articles in newspaper magazines and websites, trained on data generated from scraping popular astrology websites.
\end{itemize}

\divider

\cvevent{Solar Powered Center}{Project ATOM}{Feb 2017 -- Dec 2017}{Manipal, India}
\begin{itemize}
\item Design and development of methods to shape discharge profiles of batteries used in solar installation in order to bring down costs for customers and thus, ease adaptation towards solar energy
\end{itemize}

\divider

\cvevent{Communication and Ground System}{Parikshit Student Satellite Team}{Nov 2014 -– Apr 2016}{Manipal, India}
\begin{itemize}
\item Design and development of a low power communication system, for a 2U class nano-satellite, with implementation of ob-board data handling algorithms and link budget design
\end{itemize}
